title: Tessco 18 Pcs 8.5 oz Potion Bottles with Cork Lids, Round Transparent Glass Apothecary Bottles, Small Potion Bottles Decor, Decorative Jar for Decorations Indoor
description:
About this item
Sufficient Quantity: you will receive 18 pieces of the glass bottles with cork, the large quantity can certainly meet your daily requirements and DIY decorative needs, and you can also share some with others, no need to worry about the insufficiency problem
Reliable and Serviceable: our clear glass bottles are mainly made of quality glass material, which is smooth and slippery, lightweight and comfortable for you to carry, with no bubbles, the cork is not easy to drop burr residue, odorless and safe, can serve you for a long time
Proper Size: our spherical container measures approx. 3.94 x 3.5 inches/ 10 x 8.8 cm in height and diameter, and the capacity is about 250 ml/ 8.5 oz, the suitable size for you to pour things into it or do DIY crafts, and you can fill these bottles with trinkets, such as dried flower petals, sand, essential oils, and other suitable items
Novel and Clear Design: the round bottles are designed with round shape, which look like potion bottles, can be ideal props for you to cosplay a witch or a wizard on Halloween, being your eye catching additions to your costume
Wide Range of Applications: these round bottles with lids can be applied as perfume bottles, message bottles, storage accessories, party gifts and more, they can also be available for making many handmade crafts and decorations, and you can fill them with colorful items to make them more attractive, better decorating your festival and home
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Got these for a party holds a lot but wash them asap other than that they are solidThese bottles are perfect for Halloween decor and look super adorable as little potion bottles. They are quite big and seem very well made. This is an excellent value for the price.
